# zeroquery-protocol

> Zero-query protocol by ScriptMasterLabs. Agent-native data access with x402 payment rails.

This repository is part of the ScriptMasterLabs sovereign AI ecosystem.

## Agent Discovery

- Master llms.txt: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/llms.txt
- Agent quickstart: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/agent-start.html
- OpenAPI spec: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/.well-known/openapi.json

## Payment

x402 protocol — RLUSD on XRPL or USDC on Base.

## Data Policy

All data is live and real. No mock, demo, simulation, or placeholder data is permitted anywhere in this codebase.
